claim_bullets.bullet_text: Generators build iterators that maintain implicit state, useful for recursive unfolds and state machines (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.273-292).
There are other situations where functions must maintain implicit state, and generators might help (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.273-292).
A stateful naughts‑and‑crosses game example shows how state can be kept in control flow, rather than data, illustrating interactive generator potential (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.273-292).

source_record_text: Explores interactive generators, contrasts with stateful functions, and illustrates with a naughts‑and‑crosses example.
